svg.title: ML Prediction Architecture for HDMAS
svg.desc: Flowchart showing gold layer data flowing into feature engineering, model training, prediction output, and the Streamlit ML tab UI.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What columns does the Snowflake gold table have?')
sendPrompt('What features will be engineered from the gold layer?')
sendPrompt('What ML model will be used and why?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the lag features used in the ML model')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about rolling statistics features')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about momentum features in the ML model')
sendPrompt('Why include hour-of-day and minute features?')
sendPrompt('How is the predicted VWAP price computed?')
sendPrompt('How is the price direction signal computed?')
sendPrompt('Which model evaluation metrics will be shown?')
sendPrompt('What should the ML tab UI look like in Streamlit?')
g.text: Train · Predict · Reset | metrics cards | forecast chart | feature importance bar

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What changes are needed in actions.py for ML?')
sendPrompt('What changes are needed in tabs.py for ML?')
